sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109690" key="u(/sgh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὕσγη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a shrub from which comes the dye <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὕσγινον,</foreign> prob. <sense id="n109690.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">kermesoak, Quercus coccifera,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>; prob. cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὗς</foreign> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:10:36:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.36.1</biblScope> </bibl> (who says it is a Galatian word, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κόκκος</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
